title: Goat Man
body:
Goat Man brings a terrifying stalker creature into Minecraft 1.20.1. Lurking in dark underground areas, the Goat Man
  watches players from the shadows, plays unsettling sounds, and appears when you least expect it.
  animations, sounds, and aggressive behavior, this mod is built to make caves and low-light exploration far more
  intense. Thanks to im_jsweckie and LunarGroup for the Mods so i could modify it for 1.20.1 and make it 1 mod please dont take me as the credit for these 2 mobs as i did not code or model, texture, or animate.
